arts.ttl: ‘Kickstarting his career again’ - Crystal Palace boss on loan deal for Chelsea defender with first start handed in Millwall FA Cup clash
arts.sum: That improvement was a key reason for Chilwell joining the south London club with his minutes limited at Chelsea and Glasner believes the player is close to being back to his best. “He’s integrated great from day one,” said Glasner.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth round LIVE! Palace host Millwall & Preston face Burnley
arts.sum: The draw for the FA Cup quarter-final will be made on Sunday March 2, following the tie between Manchester United and Fulham. 4. Manchester United or Fulham

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace v Millwall: FA Cup fifth round – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 12.15pm GMT kick-off at Selhurst Park Live scoreboard | Email Emillia | Sign up for Football Daily “Palace are in buoyant form, solidly placed in the league and a potent presence in this side of the draw. Millwall are safely lodged in the Millwall Zone of the past few seasons, eternally six to eight points off the Championship playoffs. It seems fair to say Saturday’s Cup tie is the biggest event in the calendar for either of these teams as the season starts to narrow to its end point.” While we eagerly await kick-off, click here to read Barney Ronay’s take on today’s derby. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner has outlined his big Crystal Palace wish ahead of Millwall showdown
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss will face his first South London derby in the FA Cup sixth round tie at Selhurst Park on Saturday and OLiver Glasner is looking to take Palace to Wembley

arts.ttl: Glasner reveals goalkeeper choice ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Speaking in his pre-Millwall press conference, Oliver Glasner gave an insight into his team selection, and his thoughts on the new technology which will be in use in FA Cup fifth-round tie.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner to go full strength against Millwall - but there will be Crystal Palace goalkeeper change
arts.sum: He deserves some games and that’s why he will start tomorrow.” Oliver Glasner says his Crystal Palace side will not need a rest against Millwall but will change the starting goalkeeper for Saturday’s FA Cup clash.

arts.ttl: Japhet Tanganga relishing Crystal Palace test after finding solace at Millwall
arts.sum: Japhet Tanganga is enjoying a new lease of life at Millwall after leaving Tottenham Hotspur in the summer and will be a key man in their big FA Cup clash with Crystal Palace
Eight months after the goalkeeper's sudden death at the age of 26, Matija Sarkic's memory lives on at Millwall.
